title: Prime Senate Spire
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Structure |image=[[File:Tarkin_and_his_wife.png]] |name=Prime Senate Spire
{{C|Depicted in Wilhuff Tarkin's apartment}} |constructed= |destroyed= |type= |location=[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]''[[Rogue Planet]]'' |interest=[[Wilhuff Tarkin's apartment]] |rebuilt= |builder= |height= |width= |affiliation= }} The '''Prime Senate Spire''' was a building on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It had a residential section that was two [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] higher than most of the [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]]. Between [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Rogue Planet]]'', which includes the appearance of [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin's]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin's apartment|apartment]], to [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]]. and [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]],{{Topps|set=2013 Topps Star Wars Illustrated: A New Hope|subset=One Year Earlier|cardname=Grand Moff Tarkin|link=https://www.beckett.com/non-sports/2013/star-wars-illustrated-a-new-hope-one-year-earlier/oy11-grand-moff-tarkin-9550174}} states that all cards in the "One Year Earlier" set take place a [[Standard year|year]] before the events of {{Film|IV}}, which corresponds to [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]]{{Topps|set=2013 Topps Star Wars Illustrated: A New Hope|subset=One Year Earlier|cardname=Grand Moff Tarkin|link=https://www.beckett.com/non-sports/2013/star-wars-illustrated-a-new-hope-one-year-earlier/oy11-grand-moff-tarkin-9550174}} [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]] owned an [[Wilhuff Tarkin's apartment|apartment]] high in the residential section of the building. In the latter [[Standard year|year]], the Grand Moff and his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] [[Thalassa Tarkin|Thalassa]] were present in the apartment when he informed her of his new assignment aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station|Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]].{{Film|IV}} ==Behind the scenes== The Prime Senate Spire appeared in ''[[Rogue Planet]]'', a [[2000]] novel by author [[Greg Bear]]. It was first pictured on the trading card "Grand Moff Tarkin," published as part of the trading card subset "One Year Earlier" from the ''[[2013 Topps Star Wars Illustrated: A New Hope]]'' series on [[November 6]], [[2013]].[[Star Wars Insider 145|''Star Wars Insider'' 145]] {{C|Advertisement}} ==Appearances== *''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book and [[Rogue Planet (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}} *[[Rogue Planet (abridged audiobook)|''Rogue Planet'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *{{Topps|set=2013 Topps Star Wars Illustrated: A New Hope|subset=One Year Earlier|cardname=Grand Moff Tarkin|link=https://www.beckett.com/non-sports/2013/star-wars-illustrated-a-new-hope-one-year-earlier/oy11-grand-moff-tarkin-9550174}} {{1stp}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Coruscant residential buildings]]
